1. 2024 - Summer Olympics - Paris
2. 2028 - Summer Olympics - Los Angeles

4. 2022 - Winter Olympics - Beijing, China
5. 2026 - Winter Olympics - Milan & Cortina, Italy

Santosh Trophy 2024 : WB wins Defeating Kerala
Haryana Steelers won their first ‘Pro Kabaddi League Title (season 11)’ defeating Patna Pirates
Australia beats India 3-1 to win Border-Gavaskar Trophy after 10 years
Vijay Hazare Trophy 2024-25: Karnataka wins defeating Vidarbha
Shrachi Rarh Bengal Tigers won the first ever title of the ‘Men’s Hockey India League 2024-25 (HIL)’ defeating Hyderabad Toofans
In the 2024-25 season, Mohun Bagan Super Giant (MBSG) won the ISL Winners Shield by defeating Odisha FC.

‘2025 Para Archery Asia Cup’ in Bangkok, Thailand
India : 12 medals (6 gold + 3 silver + 3 bronze)
2024-25 Ranji Trophy: Vidarbha defeated Kerala to Clinch 3rd Title

1. Brazil will host - 2027 FIFA Women’s World Cup.
2. USA and UK - FIFA Women’s World Cup in 2031 and 2035.
President - Gianni Infantino

FIFA men's world cup 2026
By USA + Mexico + Canada

World Boxing Cup 2025 in Brazil
Uzbekistan tops. India 2nd with 6 medals.
Hitesh Gulia Wins Gold

Cricket Returns to Olympics After 128 Years in LA Olympics 2028
6 teams men, women each

AIFF's Footballer of the year 2025
Men - Subasish Bose (Mohunbagan) WB
Women - Soumya Guguloth (East Bengal) Odisha
Brazil to host FIFA Women’s World Cup in 2027
Pakistan Clinch ACC Men’s U19 Asia Cup 2025 Title by Defeating India
2026 FIH Hockey World Cup will jointly be hosted by India and Netherlands.

Commonwealth Games 2030 will be held in Ahmedabad, Gujarat,
Marking India’s second time hosting the Games after the 2010 Delhi edition

Ranji Trophy 24-25 - Vidarbha
Vijay Hazare Trophy 25-26 - Bihar.
Women Asia Cup 24 - Sri Lanka
Women World Cup 25 - India vs SA (runner-up)
Olympic 1st Gold - Abhinav Bindra 2008 Shooting
Olympic 2nd Gold - Neeraj Chopra 2020 Javelin Throw

2025 IPL - RCB Punjab Kings. Captain Rajat Patidar
Orange Cap: Prasidh Krishna; Purple Cap: Sai Sudarshan.
ICC Cricket World Cup 2027 (South Africa, Zimbabwe, Namibia)

FIFA World Cup 2022 winner: Argentina; runner-up: France.
FIFA World Cup 2026 (USA, Mexico, Canada)

1. Under-19 Asia Cup: 2025 in UAE. IN vs Pak (W)
2. Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy (India’s domestic T20): Winner Jharkhand / Haryana. Captain: Ishan Kishan.
3. Women’s Blind Cricket: India Won the inaugural Women’s Blind Cricket World Cup 2020 in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
4. Women’s Kabaddi World Cup 2025: Held in Dhaka, Bangladesh. India won the title for the 2nd consecutive time.
5. Kho Kho World Cup 2025: in New Delhi. Both men’s and women’s teams won, defeating Nepal in finals.
6. Dhyanchand Khel Ratna Award 2024: Awarded to four personalities including D. Mukesh, Manu Bhaker, Harmanpreet Singh, and Praveen Kumar.
7. Men’s and Women’s Kabaddi World Cup 2025: Held in England. India won both titles.
8. ICC Champions Trophy 2025: Hosted by Pakistan (India’s matches in UAE). India won vs New Zealand in final.
9. ICC Under-19 Women’s T20 World Cup 2025: held in Malaysia. India won defeating South Africa in final.
